notes: Leader owns Ultragoal; this artifact does not mutate .omx/ultragoal.
Rows are scoped intake/classification evidence for Worker 1/Task 2 board integration.

issue_clusters.title: Permission modes do not enforce path scope on file tools or shell expansion in bash
verification_required: workspace-write cannot read/write/delete outside workspace
shell expansion and symlink traversal are rejected or policy-blocked
file tools and bash use the same target-scope decision record
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Security/sandbox escape class; plan names #3007 as alpha blocker.

issue_clusters.title: OpenAI-compatible model IDs with slashes are stripped before request
verification_required: OpenAI-compatible endpoint receives exact model id when preservation is enabled
status JSON reports raw model input, route, and wire model id
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Core provider correctness but below alpha state/security contracts unless it blocks the selected alpha model path.

issue_clusters.title: Not Working in windows
verification_required: fresh Windows/PowerShell setup smoke documented
unsupported native paths fail with actionable WSL2/native guidance
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Real adoption blocker; plan places Windows/install in beta adoption overlay.

issue_clusters.title: DeepSeek V4-flash/pro fails with 400 Bad Request (missing reasoning_content) while deepseek-reasoner works
verification_required: provider 400 response classified with actionable remediation
DeepSeek-compatible response-shape fixture does not hide assistant output
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Provider compatibility issue that shares the #3032 diagnostics lane.

issue_clusters.title: When can we adapt to zed?
dependencies: engine API or ACP bridge decision
verification_required: Zed/ACP smoke once core state/control contracts exist
issue_clusters.deferral_rationale: IDE integration is valuable but should wait until boot/session/event/control truth surfaces are stable.
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Matches plan's GA ecosystem lane for Zed/ACP.

issue_clusters.title: .claude/sessions should not be submitted to repo
verification_required: session directories are ignored
status/doctor warns about tracked session artifacts
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Small but user-visible session hygiene and data-leak prevention item.

issue_clusters.title: License?
verification_required: repository license file exists
package metadata and docs reference the same license
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Adoption/readiness documentation gap; requires maintainer decision before implementation.

issue_clusters.title: Protect claw-code from AI slop PRs
verification_required: selected PR quality gate runs on sample good/bad PR fixtures
maintainers can override false positives
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Protects project throughput but should not precede alpha core safety contracts.

issue_clusters.title: docs: add navigation and file-context usage guide
verification_required: docs include terminal history, scrollback, @file context, attach/external file caveats
examples work against current CLI
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Documentation support item from latest open issue refresh.

issue_clusters.title: build: add cross-platform installer path and release artifact quickstart
verification_required: install quickstart smoke on supported OS/arch
failed install prints actionable diagnostics
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Distribution friction belongs in adoption overlay.

issue_clusters.title: feat: make provider/model setup less env-var-driven
verification_required: setup validates provider route without echoing keys
session-only versus persisted profile behavior is explicit
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Directly reduces current provider setup support churn.

issue_clusters.title: feat: auto-compact or clearly recover from context-window provider errors
verification_required: context-window error either compacts+retries once safely or emits exact recovery command
compaction event is machine-visible
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Recovery reliability item; promoted only if selected alpha provider path hits it.

issue_clusters.title: docs: add OpenAI-compatible/local provider diagnostics playbook
verification_required: playbook distinguishes Claw bugs from wrapper/tool-call-shape bugs
curl examples cover non-streaming and streaming tool calls
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Shared diagnostic lane for #3005/#3020/local model reports.

issue_clusters.title: feat: add minimal claw serve JSON-RPC engine API
verification_required: protocol conformance fixtures for session/create prompt/stream cancel error
capability negotiation backwards compatibility
issue_clusters.deferral_rationale: Engine API should expose, not invent, stable core control-plane semantics after alpha contracts land.
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Useful integration surface but too broad for alpha unless narrowed to existing session control API.

issue_clusters.title: docs: define evidence-gated Hermes handoff loop for Claw Code execution
verification_required: handoff packet fixture validates scope/success/test evidence fields
post-flight gate consumes evidence instead of free-text summary
issue_clusters.deferral_rationale: Can inform event/report/task contracts, but Hermes-specific loop should stay research/docs until core schemas are stable.
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Only the generic evidence-gated contract is Claw 2.0; Hermes branding is not core.

issue_clusters.title: fix: improve compacted session resume discoverability
verification_required: /resume latest finds newest eligible compacted session
/session or status lists resumable compacted sessions with path/id

issue_clusters.title: docs: add official Ollama/llama.cpp/vLLM local model examples
verification_required: docs include Ollama/llama.cpp/vLLM examples and HELLO smoke
tool-call caveats are explicit

issue_clusters.title: docs: clarify Claw Code positioning as multi-provider Claude-Code-shaped runtime
verification_required: README/docs answer Claude-only question directly
provider support wording matches implemented routes
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Clarifies product identity for adoption without broad implementation.

issue_clusters.title: roadmap: track skills/plugins/marketplace ecosystem gap after core UX stabilizes
verification_required: extension point inventory exists
marketplace work explicitly depends on core UX stabilization
issue_clusters.deferral_rationale: Marketplace breadth should wait until core setup/auth/provider/session UX and plugin lifecycle are reliable.
issue_clusters.classification_rationale: Matches plan's ga_ecosystem/post-2.0 caution for marketplace parity.

parity_rows.title: Plugin/skills/marketplace ecosystem inventory
verification_required: inventory maps current Claw plugin/skill/MCP extension points before marketplace implementation
parity_rows.deferral_rationale: Adapt ecosystem discovery only after core setup/provider/session reliability is stable.

parity_rows.title: Quick permission preset switching mapped onto Claw policy profiles
verification_required: preset switch is visible in status/report output and cannot bypass path-scope enforcement

parity_rows.title: Custom API parameter passthrough for provider profiles
verification_required: custom params are schema-validated, redacted, and visible as provenance without leaking secrets

parity_rows.title: Task/Todo completion assistance via typed task lifecycle
verification_required: auto-complete suggestions cannot mark work complete without evidence bundle or explicit user approval
parity_rows.deferral_rationale: Useful UX should follow, not precede, typed task lifecycle and evidence contract.

parity_rows.title: Windows/GLIBC/distribution reliability parity lessons
verification_required: release quickstart documents supported OS matrix and known terminal/encoding caveats

parity_rows.title: Granular app/plugin permissions adapted to Claw policy engine
verification_required: granular permission grants do not widen workspace path scope implicitly

parity_rows.title: Safe local session/thread recovery without storage amplification
verification_required: recoverable sessions are discoverable and session forks avoid unbounded duplicate history

parity_rows.title: Provider/network diagnostics include proxy behavior
verification_required: diagnostics report whether proxy env/config is honored for provider calls

parity_rows.title: CLI flag for agent/subagent mode mapped to Claw typed task packets
verification_required: CLI agent mode cannot bypass task policy or evidence requirements
parity_rows.deferral_rationale: Implement only after core task/session control contracts are stable.
